title: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) Stock Forecast & Price Prediction 2026–2030
text: CoinCodex provides stock price forecast and prediction analysis for AMD covering 2026-2030. The forecast incorporates current financial performance, analyst consensus estimates, and macroeconomic factors. 2026 expectations: Revenue growth of 34% and EPS growth of 88% support continued stock appreciation. Current technical levels suggest potential for $450-$500 price targets by end of 2026, consistent with Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley upgrades. 2027-2028 outlook: As AI infrastructure investments mature and MI450 products ramp, revenue growth moderates to 35-40% range but remains healthy. EPS growth of 60%+ supports continued multiple expansion. 2029-2030: Growth rates normalize to 15-25% range as market maturity increases, but AMD could achieve $100+ billion revenue run rate, positioning it as a mega-cap technology leader. Risk factors: NVIDIA competition, economic slowdown, supply chain disruptions, and technology transitions. Price targets assume successful execution on MI450, continued EPYC market share gains, and sustained demand for AI infrastructure.
